questions.q: The Information Technology (Amendment) Act of 2008 has defined cyber terrorism as?
questions.answer: A person commits cyber terrorism if he intentionally accesses or damages critical information, including the spinal cord system, so as to endanger the physical or functional safety of the nation.

questions.q: Who is the head of the Cyber Regulations Appellate Authority (CRAA)?
questions.answer: The Secretary of the Department of Information Technology

questions.q: What is the name of the committee constituted by the Government of India to examine the issues related to cyber security?
questions.answer: The Committee of Experts constituted under the Chairmanship of Shri Samir Kumar B. N. (Additional Secretary, Department of Electronics and Information Technology (DeitY))

questions.q: Which of the following is not an offence under the Information Technology Act, 2000?
What is the purpose of the Cyber Appellate Tribunal (CAT) under the Information Technology Act, 2000?
questions.answer: To hear and decide on appeals arising out of the orders of the Controller of Certifying Authorities

questions.q: Who is responsible for the security of the computer resource?
What is the name of the organization responsible for coordinating the efforts of various government agencies to combat cybercrime?
questions.answer: The Indian Computer Emergency Response Team (CERT-IN)

questions.q: What is the punishment for the offence of hacking under the Information Technology Act, 2000?
questions.answer: Imprisonment for not less than one year but which may extend to three years and shall also be liable to fine

questions.q: What is the definition of 'electronic signature' under the Information Technology Act, 2000?
questions.answer: Data message, electronic sound, or electronic image attached to or logically associated with other data messages and which is used by the originator thereof to signify information or intention of the originator

questions.q: Which of the following is the primary purpose of the Information Technology Act, 2000?
questions.answer: To provide for the legal framework for electronic governance and digital economy
